block.fluid.centrifugal_pump.tooltip.sum: Transports further and faster than _Mechanical Pumps_, can be encased with _Copper Casing_
block.fluid.copper_sink.tooltip.summary: A beautiful copper sink that always stays full. Any fluid input is destroyed; Infinite water output
block.fluid.copper_tap.tooltip.summary: Right-click to switch. Can fill _Basins_, _Cauldrons_ below, or perform spout processing on _Depots_ below
block.fluid.fluid_interface.tooltip.beha: Allows _direct fluid interaction_ with the attached container using buckets or fluid containers
block.fluid.fluid_interface.tooltip.summ: A _proxy_ block for interfacing with adjacent fluid containers
block.fluid.redstone_triple_valve.toolti: A fluid pipe whose turning direction can be controlled with a redstone signal.
block.fluid.redstone_valve.tooltip.summa: A fluid valve that can be turned on and off with a redstone signal.
block.fluid.smart_fluid_interface.toolti: Only allows _specified fluids_ to be inserted or extracted
Functions as a _filtered gateway_ to the attached container, preventing unwanted fluid types from passing through
An _advanced proxy_ block for fluid containers with _filtering capabilities_ that restricts which fluids can pass through
block.fluid.smart_repackager.tooltip.sum: Re-packs _cardboard packages_, _Copper Cans_, and similar logistics carriers into _Brass Boxes_, marking their _upper and lower routing_ information. _Brass Boxes_ can only be unpacked by _Logistics Junctions_; the vertical arrangement of _Factory Gauges_ on a wall affects how Logistics Junctions route package contents between upper and lower outputs.
create.create.fluid.logistics_junction.l: Logistics Junction upper output link cleared
The selected block cannot accept items or fluids from that face
The selected Logistics Junction is no longer available
Logistics Junction selected; right-click a target block to bind the upper output
Target must be in the same dimension
create.create.mechanical_arm.points_outs: %1$s selected interaction point(s) removed due to range limitations
create.create.mechanical_arm.summary: Mechanical Arm has %1$s input(s) and %2$s output(s)
create.create_fluid.baton.frogport.targe: Chain target selected; right-click the Frogport again to confirm
create.create_fluid.baton.mailbox.alread: This postbox is already connected to this station
create.create_fluid.baton.mailbox.target: Target station selected; right-click the Postbox again to confirm
create.create_fluid.clipboard.address_se: %1$s address is set by sign, cannot override
create.create_fluid.clipboard.no_valid_a: No valid address on clipboard (start with #)
create.fluid.clipboard.address_set_by_si: %1$s address is set by sign, remove the sign and try again
create.fluid.clipboard.copy.no_address: This block has no address to copy
create.fluid.clipboard.paste.no_valid_ad: No valid address on clipboard (start with #)
create.fluid.clipboard.tooltip.hint: Hold Clipboard and right-click to copy address, left-click to paste
create.fluid.mechanical_pipette.no_targe: It appears this _Mechanical_ _Pipette_ has not been assigned any _targets._ Select basin, drain, fluid interface and other blocks by _right-clicking_ them while _holding_ the _Mechanical_ _Pipette_ in your _hand_
create.fluid.mechanical_pipette.points_o: %1$s Fluid Interaction Points were removed because they are now out of range
create.hint.mechanical_arm_no_targets: It appears this _Mechanical_ _Arm_ has not been assigned any _targets._ Select belts, depots, funnels and other blocks by _right-clicking_ them while _holding_ the _Mechanical_ _Arm_ in your _hand_
fluid.ponder.baton.text_3: Sometimes you may want to add or modify interaction points after a Mechanical Arm has been placed
fluid.ponder.baton.text_4: Right-Click it with the Conductor's Baton to enter conducting mode. All interaction points will be continuously highlighted
fluid.ponder.baton.text_5: Now you can adjust the Arm's interaction points just as if you were holding the Arm itself
fluid.ponder.baton.text_6: Once finished, Right-Click the Arm again to update its interaction point configuration
fluid.ponder.baton.text_7: Interaction points of Mechanical Pipette and Ejector Depot can also be modified with the Conductor's Baton
fluid.ponder.baton_advanced.text_1: The Conductor's Baton can also switch some utility blocks directly. Right-click a Rose Quartz Lamp to quickly toggle its state.
fluid.ponder.baton_advanced.text_2: For Packagers, Re-packagers, and Can Fillers that inherit packager behavior, the Baton can quickly toggle their redstone-enabled state.
fluid.ponder.baton_advanced.text_3: Right-click a Frogport to enter connection mode. Then select a point on a Chain Conveyor to connect it to the package line.
fluid.ponder.baton_advanced.text_4: Postboxes use a similar selection flow: select the Postbox first, then choose the delivery target to bind it to.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_1: Can Fillers are the core of the fluid logistics system. They draw fluid from the container behind them and seal it into Copper Cans.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_10: Once set, you can use these components to directly request fluid stock.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_2: Via Funnels or Package Frogports, Copper Cans can circulate through the logistics system and be received by another Can Filler or a Logistics Junction.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_3: The Fluid Tank behind the Can Filler supplies it with source fluid.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_4: Activate the Can Filler with a redstone signal to pack fluid into a Copper Can.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_5: Copper Cans can be transported to anywhere in the logistics network.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_6: A receiving Can Filler consumes the Copper Can and injects the stored fluid back into the tank behind it.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_7: If the tank behind a Can Filler already contains fluid, it will only accept incoming Copper Cans with the same fluid, while a Logistics Junction can route the can to another fluid target.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_8: After setting an address on the Can Filler using a Sign, the output Copper Cans will carry that address.
fluid.ponder.can_filler.text_9: To set a specific fluid in a Factory Gauge or Redstone Requester, you need to use a Fluid Manifest.
fluid.ponder.centrifugal_pump.text_1: Centrifugal Pumps have more powerful transfer rates and longer transfer distances than Mechanical Pumps, but consume more stress
fluid.ponder.centrifugal_pump.text_2: The pump's pressure travels up to 20 blocks along pipes, regardless of input power
fluid.ponder.centrifugal_pump.text_3: At the same speed, Centrifugal Pumps transfer fluids twice as fast as Mechanical Pumps
fluid.ponder.centrifugal_pump.text_4: The pump's transfer direction is not affected by rotation direction
fluid.ponder.centrifugal_pump.text_5: Instead, the side panel can be used to control the pump's transfer direction
fluid.ponder.centrifugal_pump.text_6: If using the panel is inconvenient, right-click with the Conductor's Baton for quick switching
fluid.ponder.centrifugal_pump.text_7: Copper Casing can be used to encase the Centrifugal Pump
fluid.ponder.centrifugal_pump.text_8: Encased pumps no longer have a panel; their transfer direction is controlled by rotation direction
fluid.ponder.communicating_vessel.text_1: Communicating Vessels connect adjacent fluid containers directly, without power or extra pipes.
fluid.ponder.communicating_vessel.text_2: When the fluid levels differ, they transfer fluid from the higher side to the lower side until both sides balance out.
fluid.ponder.communicating_vessel.text_3: Both ends must be empty or already contain the same fluid; different fluids will not mix through the vessel.
fluid.ponder.communicating_vessel.text_4: They also work with infinite sources such as Creative Fluid Tanks, continuously topping up the other side.
fluid.ponder.communicating_vessel.text_5: Any neighboring block face with fluid-handling capability can be linked this way, including tanks, basins, and creative tanks.
fluid.ponder.copper_tap.text_1: Copper Taps draw fluid from containers behind them and can fill Cauldrons or Basins below
fluid.ponder.copper_tap.text_2: Copper Taps can be attached to leaves and infinitely output water from waterlogged leaves
fluid.ponder.copper_tap.text_3: Copper Taps can perform spout processing on Depots below
fluid.ponder.copper_tap.text_4: Redstone signals can be used to control the tap's on/off state
fluid.ponder.fluid_atomizer.text_1: The Fluid Atomizer creates an air current like a fan, using its internal fluid as the catalyst.
fluid.ponder.fluid_atomizer.text_2: At least 250 mB of fluid is required before the air current gains a processing effect.
fluid.ponder.fluid_atomizer.text_3: Water turns the airflow into a splashing setup.
fluid.ponder.fluid_atomizer.text_4: Like regular fan processing, depots and belts can both be processed.
fluid.ponder.fluid_atomizer.text_5: Changing the stored fluid immediately changes the atomizer's processing type.
fluid.ponder.fluid_atomizer.text_6: Any registered fan-processing catalyst fluid can be reused by the atomizer, including mod compat.
fluid.ponder.fluid_atomizer_potion.text_: Potion fluids are expelled as lingering effect clouds.
Creatures inside the airflow receive the potion effect.
For balance, potion clouds apply shorter durations than direct potion use.
fluid.ponder.gutter_outlet.text_1: Gutter Outlets can be used to drain large bodies of fluid above them, just like Hose Pulleys
fluid.ponder.gutter_outlet.text_2: Gutter Outlets can also collect lava like a cauldron, or to collect fluid in rainy or snowy weather
fluid.ponder.gutter_outlet.text_3: Right-click it to pour fluid from your held item into it, or to extract fluid
fluid.ponder.gutter_outlet.text_4: Pipe Networks can now pull the fluid from their internal buffer
fluid.ponder.gutter_outlet_interact.head: Gutter Outlet Interactions
fluid.ponder.gutter_outlet_interact.text: Copper Taps can fill Gutter Outlets
Smart Gutter Outlets have the same functionality, but can be set filter, or disabled with a redstone signal
Gutter Outlets will automatically fill fluid containers placed directly below them
Gutter Outlets can accept a Basin’s output
Mechanical Pipettes can deposit fluid into or extract fluid from Gutter Outlets
fluid.ponder.logistics_junction_fluid.te: Logistics Junctions can receive plain fluid streams and route them by the filters on their outputs.
In the default mode, the three non-facing horizontal sides are fluid inputs.
The facing side is the local output. Here, it connects to a filtered Smart Gutter Outlet.
The upper connection is assigned to a second filtered Smart Gutter Outlet elsewhere in the scene.
Rotational force enters from below; the bottom is reserved for stress, not fluid transfer.
Fluid pipes can feed different fluids into the input side, such as water and lava.
The Junction pushes fluid toward its outputs, and each Smart Gutter Outlet accepts only the fluid matching its filter.
fluid.ponder.logistics_junction_item.tex: Logistics Junctions can receive plain item streams and route them by the filters on their outputs.
In the default mode, the bottom is the stress input and the three non-facing horizontal sides are item inputs.
The side the Junction faces is its local output. Here, that face points into a filtered Smart Chute.
The upper connection can be assigned to another handler. This scene links it to the second filtered Smart Chute.
Rotational force enters from below; the bottom is not used for item transfer.
Belts and funnels can feed different items into the input side, such as Andesite Alloy and Brass Ingots.
The Junction tries its outputs and the Smart Chutes' filters decide which item leaves through each route.
fluid.ponder.mechanical_pipette.text_3: Mechanical Pipettes work much like Mechanical Arms, but as the name suggests, they specialize in interacting with Fluid Containers
fluid.ponder.mechanical_pipette.text_4: For containers that cannot be interacted with directly, Fluid Interfaces can help to bridge that gap
fluid.ponder.mechanical_pipette.text_5: Besides regular fluid containers, Mechanical Pipettes also support more interesting blocks, perhaps helping you express your creativity
fluid.ponder.mechanical_pipette.text_6: This is the Pipette's content gauge. It displays the current amount of fluid held
fluid.ponder.mechanical_pipette_fill.tex: Besides handling logistics, Mechanical Pipette can also be applied in processing scenarios
When a Depot or Belt is selected as output, the Pipette will watch for ingredients above that can undergo fluid filling
The Pipette will search all inputs for the required fluid, then perform the filling process
fluid.ponder.mechanical_pipette_filter.h: Filtering Targets of the Mechanical Pipette
fluid.ponder.mechanical_pipette_filter.t: Sometimes it is desirable to restrict targets of the Pipette by matching a filter
Smart Fluid Interfaces exist for this very purpose
The filter slot of Smart Fluid Interfaces can be applied to Mechanical Pipette
fluid.ponder.powder_snow.text_1: Powder Snow is now a fluid that can be collected from Cauldrons using pipes or Mechanical Pipettes
fluid.ponder.powder_snow.text_2: Powder Snow Buckets can be used to set filters for Powder Snow fluid
fluid.ponder.powder_snow.text_3: Powder Snow fluid can also be created using a Mechanical Mixer
fluid.ponder.powder_snow.text_4: Right-click the Basin to obtain Powder Snow Buckets
fluid.ponder.smart_repackager.text_1: Factory Gauges can still request materials from a linked logistics network.
fluid.ponder.smart_repackager.text_2: The requested address sends packages toward the processing line instead of directly back into storage.
fluid.ponder.smart_repackager.text_3: A Smart Re-Packager accepts incoming packages and can re-pack their contents for downstream logistics.
fluid.ponder.smart_repackager.text_4: Can Fillers can create fluid packages for the same line, using the tank behind them as the source.
fluid.ponder.smart_repackager.text_5: When stock is missing, the network prepares a package and releases it onto the belt.
fluid.ponder.smart_repackager.text_6: The Smart Re-Packager can unwrap package fragments, gather their contents, and emit a clean package again.
fluid.ponder.smart_repackager.text_7: From here, a Logistics Junction receives the stream and chooses between its local and upper outputs.
fluid.ponder.smart_repackager.text_8: Fluid goods can enter the same route as Copper Cans made by a Can Filler.
fluid.ponder.smart_repackager.text_9: Filters on the receiving handlers decide whether each package continues sideways or is lifted to the upper route.
item.fluid.baton.tooltip.summary: Used to configure interaction points for _Mechanical Arm_, _Mechanical Pipette_, _Ejector Depot_, _Packager_, _Re-packager_, _Package Frogport_ and _Postbox_
item.fluid.brass_box.tooltip.summary: _Brass Boxes_ are mixed cargo packages. They can carry regular items together with up to _4 fluid stacks_, while preserving package routing for _Logistics Junctions_.
item.fluid.copper_can.tooltip.summary: _Copper Cans_ are sturdier than cardboard packages. They carry a _single fluid_ stack up to _4000 mB_ and can be unpacked by a _Logistics Junction_ or another _Can Filler_.
item.fluid.fluid_manifest.tooltip.summar: Right-click a fluid source, container, bucket, bottle, or tank to sample its contents. _Sneak-right-click_ to clear. Can be used to set fluids in Factory Gauges, Redstone Requesters, and other components.
item.fluid.haunting_fluid_bucket.tooltip: Used as a catalyst for _Bulk Haunting_ when placed in front of an _Encased Fan_
item.fluid.quicksand_bucket.tooltip.summ: Used as a catalyst for _Bulk Sandblasting_ when placed in front of an _Encased Fan_
item.fluid.slime_fluid_bucket.tooltip.su: Used as a catalyst for _Bulk Glueing_ when placed in front of an _Encased Fan_
Used as a catalyst for _Bulk Smoking_ when placed in front of an _Encased Fan_
